worldDetails.backgroundSettings:
The world of "End Turn Test" exists as a palimpsest of forgotten epochs, a realm where the ruins of colossal, cyclopean structures pierce the sky and lie buried beneath vast, untamed wildernesses. Once, a civilization of unparalleled technological and arcane prowess dominated these lands, their achievements now mere whispers in the wind and enigmatic echoes in the silent, crumbling cities. Life persists amidst this grand decay, scattered settlements clinging to fertile riverbanks or sheltered valleys, largely unaware of the profound secrets entombed beneath their feet, awaiting discovery or collapse.

A pervasive, subtle energy hums across the landscape, sometimes manifesting as benign wisps of light, at other times as unsettling distortions or strange phenomena that defy natural explanation. This latent power, a remnant of the ancients, sporadically reawakens dormant mechanisms or imbues local flora and fauna with unusual properties, creating both wonders and hazards. The atmosphere is one of hopeful exploration tempered by a lurking sense of the unknown, where every journey outside the familiar can uncover either unimaginable riches or forgotten perils that could reshape the destiny of this quiet, forgotten corner of existence.
worldDetails.campaignGoal: Unravel the mysteries of the ancient civilizations and harness their power or knowledge to either restore the world to a new golden age or prevent a dormant, apocalyptic force from reawakening.

factions.name: The Sunstone Nomads
factions.description: A nomadic tribe traversing the plains, seeking ancient energy sources for survival and power.

factions.name: The Keepers of the Whispering Woods
factions.description: A secluded community dwelling in a heavily forested region, wary of outsiders and guarding ancient knowledge.

factions.name: The Iron Scavengers
factions.description: A mercenary group focused on looting ancient ruins for salvageable technology and artifacts, selling to the highest bidder.

locations.name: The Spire of Aethel
locations.description: A towering, crystalline structure piercing the clouds, radiating strange energies and rumored to be a nexus point.

locations.name: The Sunken City of K'tharr
locations.description: A vast, submerged metropolis rumored to hold a powerful ancient device or knowledge, now home to strange aquatic life.

locations.name: The Verdant Expanse
locations.description: A massive, overgrown jungle teeming with unique, sometimes dangerous, flora and fauna mutated by latent ancient energies.

artifacts.name: Chronos Shard
artifacts.effect: Allows for subtle manipulation of localized time, granting brief glimpses into the past or future.

artifacts.name: Aether-weave Cloak
artifacts.effect: Grants minor stealth capabilities and elemental resistance when worn, shimmering with faint, archaic patterns.

artifacts.name: Harmonic Resonator
artifacts.effect: Emits a focused sonic pulse capable of activating ancient mechanisms or disorienting living beings.
